full_text:
Zhongli Mu (Zigan) 鍾離牧 (子幹)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhongli Mu (鍾離牧), styledZigan (子幹), was born in Shanyin county, Kuaiji commandery. Smashed the Wuqi barbarians with an aggressive and quick camapign. Zhongli Mu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
